commands.review_summary:
This PR changes `createBlockReplyPipeline` to track streamed text fragments per assistant message and adds regression tests for duplicate final suppression after multi-message block streaming.

PR surface: Source +9, Tests +61. Total +70 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level. Current main and v2026.6.9 aggregate all streamed fragments before comparing to each final, so two separately streamed assistant messages cannot suppress their own final payloads.
commands.review_followup: - No automated repair lane is indicated; maintainers should resolve exact-head CI and decide whether optional live transport proof is needed before landing.
